## Summary

<!-- What this changes and why, in 1–2 sentences. -->

## Component(s)

<!-- vpc · ec2 · network · compute-engine · github · automation-roles — or docs / ci / repo-wide -->

## Type

<!-- Keep the lines that apply — this maps to CHANGELOG sections + the semver bump. -->

- [ ] Added — new component or feature (MINOR)
- [ ] Changed — behavior change to an existing component
- [ ] Fixed — bug fix (PATCH)
- [ ] Removed
- [ ] **Breaking** input/output change — callers must edit their config (MAJOR; flag loudly in CHANGELOG)

## Changes

<!-- Bullet the notable changes. -->

-

## Validation

- [ ] `terraform fmt` / `validate` / `tflint` pass on the changed components (the gate)
- [ ] Commit subjects are consumer-facing, `type(scope): subject` with scope = component (the CHANGELOG is **generated** from them at release time — preview in the PR's changelog comment)
- [ ] Component README / root README updated if inputs or outputs changed
